# Satah Invoices

> Cloud invoicing software for small businesses in India: create GST-ready invoices, estimates, credit notes; manage clients, payments, expenses and inventory.

Satah Invoices helps small businesses send professional invoices in seconds, track receivables, record payments, manage recurring billing, and generate GST-compliant documents (CGST/SGST/IGST) with QR codes and UPI links. Multi-currency, multi-template, and built for fast bulk entry.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and sign-in entry point.
- [Sign In](/login): Log in to your account or try the demo.
- [Sign Up](/register): Create a new Satah Invoices account.
- [Forgot Password](/forgot-password): Email-based password reset.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): KPIs, receivables aging and smart insights.
- [Invoices](/invoices): Create, send and track GST invoices.
- [Estimates](/estimates): Quotes that convert to invoices.
- [Credit Notes](/credit-notes): Issue refunds and credit adjustments.
- [Payments](/payments): Record and reconcile customer payments.
- [Clients](/clients): Customer directory with statements and ledgers.
- [Items](/items): Product/service catalog with tax presets.
- [Inventory](/inventory): Stock tracking with low-stock warnings.
- [Expenses](/expenses): Recurring business expense tracking.
- [Recurring Invoices](/recurring-invoices): Automated billing schedules.
- [Reports](/reports): Receivables, sales and tax reports.
- [Profit & Loss](/profit-loss): Monthly P&L and GST summary.
- [Statements](/statements): Customer ledger statements.
- [Templates](/templates): Customize invoice/estimate templates.
- [Settings](/settings): Organization, branding and preferences.

## Optional

- [Aging Details](/aging-details): Detailed receivables aging buckets.
